nasb.text: In the fortieth year, on the first day of the eleventh month, Moses spoke to the children of Israel, according to all that the Lord had commanded him to give to them,

esv.text: In the fortieth year, on the first day of the eleventh month, Moses spoke to the people of Israel according to all that the Lord had given him in commandment to them,

cnv.text: 出埃及以後第四十年十一月一日，摩西照著耶和華吩咐他一切關於以色列人的話，都告訴了他們。

ccb.text: 在离开埃及后第四十年的十一月一日，摩西把耶和华的一切吩咐告诉了以色列人。
